div.p: Key Insight: Fragments can arrive in ANY order. The receiver must buffer all until the gap is filled. Only the last fragment (MF=0) tells us total_len.

g.text: frag_node × N | 20 bytes each | per fragment
data buffers | offset+len bytes | per fragment
uint32_t hash = src_ip ^ dst_ip ^ id ^ proto;
